# UC-15.5.4 · CCTV Motion Event Rate Anomaly After Hours

## Description

Motion storms overnight may indicate wildlife, unsecured doors, or mis-tuned sensitivity worth investigating.

## Value

Prioritizes SOC video reviews and reduces false quiet.

## Implementation

(1) Normalize per-camera cadence. (2) Exclude wind/foliage masks via VMS. (3) Feed short clips workflow.

## SPL

```spl
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:motion" earliest=-14d
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| where hour<"06" OR hour>"22"
| stats count as motion_events by _time camera_id
| eventstats avg(motion_events) as baseline stdev(motion_events) as sd by camera_id
| where motion_events > baseline+3*sd
```

## Visualization

Anomaly overlay; top cameras list.

## References

- [ONVIF specifications](https://www.onvif.org/)
- [Hikvision OpenAPI / ISAPI](https://www.hikvision.com/en/support/download/sdk/)
